assertion_results.text: The plan uses semantic task IDs following the TASK-[LAYER]-[CONCERN] pattern (e.g., TASK-DOM-PASSWORD, TASK-APP-CHANGE-PASSWORD, TASK-INFRA-REPO)
assertion_results.evidence: IDs presentes no plano: 'TASK-DOM-CHANGE-PASSWORD', 'TASK-APP-CHANGE-PASSWORD-CMD', 'TASK-APP-CHANGE-PASSWORD-HANDLER', 'TASK-INFRA-HTTP-CHANGE-PASSWORD', 'TASK-MOD-REGISTER' — todos seguem o padrão TASK-[LAYER]-[CONCERN].

assertion_results.text: Each task in the plan references exactly one file in the 'File:' field — no task spans multiple files
assertion_results.evidence: TASK-DOM-CHANGE-PASSWORD → `internal/user/domain/user.go`; TASK-APP-CHANGE-PASSWORD-CMD → `internal/user/application/change_password_command.go`; TASK-APP-CHANGE-PASSWORD-HANDLER → `internal/user/application/change_password_handler.go`; TASK-INFRA-HTTP-CHANGE-PASSWORD → `internal/user/infrastructure/http/change_password_handler.go`; TASK-MOD-REGISTER → `internal/user/module.go`. Cada task tem exatamente um campo '**File:**'.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes an Execution section (Section 3) that mirrors every task defined in the Plan section
assertion_results.evidence: O output produz a Section 1 (Plan / Execution Roadmap) com as tasks, mas não inclui a Section 3 (Execution — Validated Checklist). O plano termina após o último bloco de task sem apresentar blocos de execução validada.

assertion_results.text: The plan uses markdown checkbox format [ ] for every task and sub-task entry
assertion_results.evidence: Todas as tasks usam `- [ ] **TASK-...**` e todos os sub-tasks usam `- [ ] TASK-ID.N` — formato `[ ]` aplicado consistentemente em todo o plano.
